hooks.command:
ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$ROOT"; git add -A -- ':!.claude/settings.local.json'; if [ -z "$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null)" ]; then git restore --staged . 2>/dev/null; exit 0; fi; BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current); FILES=$(git diff --cached --name-only | head -3 | tr '
' ', ' | sed 's/, $//'); git commit -m "Auto: $FILES" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; git push origin "$BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || git push --set-upstream origin "$BRANCH" 2>/dev/null; /opt/homebrew/bin/gh pr view 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'title:' || /opt/homebrew/bin/gh pr create --fill 2>/dev/null || true
